title: Alder's Animals World
description: A Vanilla+ modpack featuring overhauled livestock and pets mobs, new tameable mounts, new upgraded structures, and vast biome and world generation!
body:
A Vanilla+ modpack vocused on animal handling, farming, exploring, and building.

Includes but is not limited to:

- DragN's Livestock Overhaul, Pet Overhaul, Permafrost, Medieval Embroidery, etc. 
- Yung's Better structures, caves, and bridges
- Biomes O' Plenty and Tectonic
- Quark
- Waystones
- Xaero's World and Minimap
- Serene Seasons

inlcudes callable horses https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/callable-horses
